name: Agentic AI Training
postCreateCommand: pip install ipykernel python-dotenv transformers sentence-transformers chromadb langchain langchain-community langgraph huggingface_hub matplotlib torch fastmcp httpx networkx nbformat nbconvert && python -m ipykernel install --user --name python3 --display-name 'Python 3.11 (Codespace)'
postAttachCommand: echo '✅ Container ready. Python 3.11 kernel active. HF_TOKEN loaded.'
